# How Biscuit

How Biscuit publishes plain-language explainers across broad topics.

Primary sections:

- Home: https://howbiscuit.com/
- Sitemap: https://howbiscuit.com/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://howbiscuit.com/feed.xml
- Unit converter: https://howbiscuit.com/tools/converters/
- Everyday cost calculators: https://howbiscuit.com/tools/calculators/
- Appliance running cost: https://howbiscuit.com/tools/cost-estimators/appliance-running-cost/
- Sales tax and budget calculator: https://howbiscuit.com/tools/cost-estimators/sales-tax/

This site is intended for public indexing unless a future experiment explicitly records a different crawl policy.
